name: create-claude-cabinet
description: Claude Cabinet — opinionated process scaffolding for Claude Code projects
author: Oren Magid

scripts.prepublishOnly:
node -e "if (!process.env.CC_ALLOW_PUBLISH) { console.error('
✗ Use /cc-publish (which runs the mandatory consumer-walk), not raw npm publish.
  Raw npm publish on v0.27.1 left every consumer stale on v0.26.
  To publish manually anyway, set CC_ALLOW_PUBLISH=1.
'); process.exit(1); }"
